message:
fix: redirect title text to homepage instead of docs site (#3728)

The "KubeStellar Console" title text in the navbar was linking to the
docs website. Now it navigates to the app homepage (/), matching the
logo behavior. A small external-link icon is added next to the title
for quick docs access.

Closes #3723

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
